ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "current_city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the customer currently resides */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marital status of the customer */,
  "no_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "lastupdated" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer record was last updated */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the customer */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "annual_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("marital_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_current_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("current_city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the city is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the marital status (e.g., Married, Single) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the marital status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marital_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the interaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who handled the interaction */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the interaction (e.g., phone, email, chat) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_interaction_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type_id") REFERENCES interaction_types ("interaction_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_types" (
  "interaction_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction type (e.g., Inquiry, Purchase) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the purchase */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the payment method used */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_purchases_shipping_address_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipping_address_id") REFERENCES shipping_addresses ("shipping_address_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or detailed feedback from the customer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID who handled the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, marketing manager, customer service agent) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the user belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_addresses" (
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping address */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who has the shipping address */,
  "address_line_1" TEXT /* First line of the shipping address */,
  "address_line_2" TEXT /* Second line of the shipping address (optional) */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the shipping address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the shipping address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the shipping address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the shipping address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_address_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_addresses_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget of the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentations" (
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segmentation */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the segmentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segmentation */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria used for the segmentation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segmentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_segmentation_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer assigned to the segment */,
  "segmentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the segment the customer is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_assignments_segmentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("segmentation_id") REFERENCES customer_segmentations ("segmentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_segmentation_assignments_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_clv" (
  "clv_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each CLV record */,
  "cust_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "clv_value" REAL /* CLV value for the customer */,
  "clv_date" TEXT /* Date the CLV was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clv_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_clv_cust_id FOREIGN KEY ("cust_id") REFERENCES customers ("cust_id")
)
